author: krisoshea.eth
content:
Hey guys, just sharing this here. It's not my week six write-up, but it's the latest doc we've created for the Lodestar Builder.
We've now created this implementation plan doc, which is basically used to describe in detail what we're working on week to week and how we plan to progress through the rest of the cohort.  we've already had some feedback from the Lodestar team, and they're now reviewing this in depth, so we'll incorporate alll feedback into the doc as it comes in.

But just thought I'd share it here in case anyone else might find this interesting or useful or might be able to apply anything in terms of the structure or layout or how we've gone about this for their own projects. 

 I hope you guys find it useful. Thanks!

author: krisoshea.eth
content:
Also, <@686695036733227017> , I was just wondering—could we add our living technical note and our implementation plan to the cohort repo? This could be done by creating a Lodestar builder directory under the projects directory or by adding it somewhere else in the repo, like under the notes section as a Lodestar builder directory with our notes there.

I just think it might be useful to have those docs in the repo, which we can make sure are kept up to date as they change. That way, the final versions will be there at the end of the cohort as well.

Just let me know if we should do that or if that would be useful. I think one directory with the proposal and the two notes might be best, but if you want them split another way, we can do that too. Yeah, let me know if that would be good. Thanks.
